title: Context, source, audit, and type boundaries hold
description: Protects KRN from broad context dumps, decorative sources, forbidden surfaces, and unchecked runtime input.

input.task: Protect against broad context dump in a source-grounded implementation task.

expectedBehavior.subject: context_assembly:broad_dump
expectedBehavior.rationale: ContextROI must keep the packet small and mark extra candidates as exclusions.

protectedFailureModes.title: broad context dump enters packet
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: ContextAssembly must not include every available candidate when the ROI budget is small.
protectedFailureModes.detection: ContextAssembly includes more than the configured maxInclusions or omits over_budget exclusions.

input.claim: A source proves the whole memory architecture is correct.

expectedBehavior.subject: source_claim:source-claim-missing-does-not-prove
expectedBehavior.rationale: Source-to-decision records must say what the source does not prove before they can guide architecture.

protectedFailureModes.title: decorative source accepted
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: A SourceClaim must not be accepted without doesNotProve.
protectedFailureModes.detection: Source grounding audit emits no blocking finding for a claim missing doesNotProve.

expectedBehavior.subject: repo_surface:research-foundry
expectedBehavior.rationale: Audit must block rejected product subsystems before they enter the runtime surface.

protectedFailureModes.title: forbidden surface accepted
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: Audit must not pass when a rejected Research Foundry surface appears.
protectedFailureModes.detection: Repo surface audit emits no blocking finding for packages/research-foundry.

expectedBehavior.subject: type_boundary:runtime-json-parse
expectedBehavior.rationale: Runtime input must be treated as unknown and validated before use.

protectedFailureModes.title: unchecked runtime input accepted
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: Runtime JSON.parse must not pass without unknown-first validation.
protectedFailureModes.detection: Type-safety audit emits no warning for unchecked JSON.parse.
